title: quercus × coutinhoi subsp. subalpestris
intro: Quercus × coutinhoi subsp. subalpestris is a rare, hybrid subspecies of oak tree that belongs to the Quercus robur and Quercus faginea species. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Quercus × coutinhoi subsp. subalpestris include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
